Content: Hey RooneyNasr 👋 just confirming we’ve received your payment through Trustap. Everything’s set for 12 December at Shelter Rotterdam.
Amazing 🙌 thanks for the confirmation. What time should I arrive for soundcheck?
Soundcheck starts around 22:30, main room. Your set is scheduled 01:00 – 03:00. We’ll have Pioneer CDJ-3000s and DJM-A9 ready, but bring your USBs and in-ears.
Perfect — I’ll arrive by 22:15. Is there an artist entrance or should I come through the main door?
Use the artist entrance on Schiehaven side, and show your booking QR when you arrive. Our team will meet you backstage.
Got it 👍 see you all soon. Appreciate the smooth process — everything’s super clear on Gigevate.

Glad to hear that 🙏 Looking forward to your set — the crowd will love it.
